messages.content:
Program ID: COBSWAIT
Paragraph: COBSWAIT-MAIN
Proposition count: 4

Ordered propositions (seq → verb → proposition):
  seq=1  ACCEPT [modifies=PARM-VALUE]  →  Read external input into PARM-VALUE
  seq=2  MOVE [modifies=MVSWAIT-TIME]  →  Set MVSWAIT-TIME to PARM-VALUE
  seq=3  CALL  →  Invoke external program 'MVSWAIT'
  seq=4  STOP RUN  →  Terminate program execution

COVERAGE REQUIREMENT: every one of these 4 seq numbers MUST appear in exactly ONE logical_groups[].statements[] array: [1, 2, 3, 4]

Produce the paragraph-level semantic synthesis per the schema in the system prompt. Split into multiple logical_groups if statement intents diverge — do NOT collapse and drop. Derive business rules ONLY from propositions that carry a real guard / transform / lookup / audit / display intent — do not invent rules for routine MOVE/SET/PERFORM statements. Every business_rules[].derived_from[] must reference an LG id you define in logical_groups[].
